name: web_scrape
description: Fetch the content of a web page and return its textual content. Follows redirects automatically and returns error messages for failures (e.g., 404, connection errors).

url.description: The URL of the web page to scrape

max_length.description: Maximum number of characters to return in the content. If the page is longer, it will be truncated. Defaults to 32768.

source.description: If true, return the raw HTML source of the page instead of extracted text.
